name: SoChain Dogecoin Blockchain API
description: SoChain (chain.so) provides a fast blockchain API for querying Dogecoin (DOGE) network data including addresses, transactions, blocks, balances, and price information. Response times average 5ms. Supports mainnet (DOGE) and testnet (DOGETEST).
